title: THE GREATEST RISK | HG Gaurmandal Das | GITA LIFE Live
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: Krishna Krishna Chaitanya Namne Gaurat Vishay Namah.
Namo Brahmanya Devaya Go Brahman Hitayacha.
Jagat Hitay Krishna Govinday Namoh Namah.
He Krishna Karuna Sindho Deen Bandho Jagat Pate.
Gopesh Gopika Kanta Radha Kanta Namostute.
Tatt Kanchana Gaurangi Radhe Vrinda Vaneshwari.
Hare Krishna Hare Krishna Krishna Krishna Hare Hare.
Hare Rama Hare Rama Rama Rama Hare Hare.
A very warm welcome to all of you.
After Maharaja Yudhishthir did a great sacrifice called Rajasuya Yajna.
He became famous not just on this planet but across other heavenly planets as well.
How come he has become so famous?
And meanwhile, they had got a very nice palace constructed by Maya Demon,
the architect of the demons, of the lower planetary systems.
Just like Vishwakarma is there, he builds it for the heavenly planets,
Maya Demon does it for the lower planets.
Maya Demon was living in a forest and Arjuna saved him by being burned down in the forest fire.
So, thus he made this very unique palace.
So, the demons are very, very expert in conjuring many tricks, creating illusions.
So, in this palace, there was such an arrangement that unless a person knows
the internal architecture, he would misinterpret land for water and vice versa.
So, Duryodhana, once he decided to see Yudhishthira Maharaj and he entered the palace,
he was anyway very envious and angry.
And the doorkeeper, there was some misunderstanding with them.
Sword was there in his hand.
And when he entered, he wanted to cross the place.
So, he mistook land as water.
And then, in this way, he fell in the water.
And Krishna also was staying at that time.
And all the thousands of queens of Krishna were also there in the palace.
All of them started laughing loudly at this instance of Duryodhana.
So, Yudhishthira Maharaj wanted to stop.
And this was the beginning of the enmity between the two.
Between the two brothers of the same family.
The Pandavas also are actually Kauravas.
They belong to the Kuru dynasty.
But nevertheless, because of this faction, we call them Pandavas and Kauravas.
So, Krishna had this plan to annihilate all the hundred sons of Dhritarashtra.
So that he does all these steps which he later took.
That led to the destruction of the entire Kaurava dynasty.
So, just like an ordinary person of this universe can conjure such tricks that land can be taken as water.
Where you are perceiving land, it is water.
And where you are perceiving water, it is actually land.
In a similar fashion, Maya, the external potency of Krishna,
it plays such amazing tricks on small conditioned souls.
That we mistake happiness as distress.
And something material is taken as spiritual.
So, that is why it is told one should never rely upon his senses.
One's senses cannot lead one to perfect knowledge.
Using one's senses, one is thinking, oh, this is land.
So, these stories are very, very...
So, just like Duryodhana was thinking, oh, here is land.
Let me step carefully onto it.
The perception was created that there is land.
There is no water over there.
In a similar fashion, Maya creates some allurements.
And people think, oh, this is my happiness.
And happiness is perceived as distress.
So, now we are going to have a very nice festival of nostalgia.
So, it is very, very important that we celebrate these festivals very nicely.
And how do we celebrate the festival?
We save the time from all other activities.
Cooking, eating, all this consumes a lot of time.
And then after eating, you become lethargic.
Why do we save it for?
To engage ourselves in the service of God.
So, actually, a sincere devotee, for him, every day is a festival.
His life is nothing but service of God.
But usually, living entities are not interested to serve the Lord.
Because serving the Lord is distress.

And if you have picked up a good number of rounds.

So, that they can eventually develop attraction and understanding of God.
So, please do not miss to celebrate these festivals.
And along with fasting, don't forget the main activity.
Sometimes people just fast and think festival is a success.
We fast so that we can come out of bodily concept of life.
When we do austerity, voluntarily we do...
We take discomforts in our life.
The austerity begins with getting up early in the morning.
People like to sleep a lot.
And snooze the clock unlimited times.

And then taking cold water bath is another tapasya.
Two times, three times bath a day is tapasya.
And like this, so many other things are there.
Which a person is supposed to undergo so that he can understand that he is not the body.
So, when we do this tapasya, we are able to realize,
Oh, this is land and this is water.
This is spirit and this is matter.

And the service begins with chanting and hearing.

First question is by Deepak Vichare.
What are different types of offenses against Vaishnava and which is the highest offense?
So I think you would have heard we discussed in the session.
The Vaishnava offense begins with, if you are not just, it begins in the mind.
You are not happy seeing a Vaishnava.
So one should be immediately delighted seeing a Vaishnava.
And then if you impede the activities of a Vaishnava or do something that may cause him any kind of disturbance, that is offense.
If you speak something directly which is offending the Vaishnava, that is verbal offense.
Physically if you do, then that is even greater offense.
And killing the Vaishnava is the greatest Vaishnava offense.
So these are the various types of Vaishnava offenses.
